prompt: Reference Image 1 and Image 2, realistic image. No cartoon textures. The person's body is facing the camera front-on. The left foot is firmly on the ground, and the right foot is bent backward 90 degrees at the knee, with the thigh vertical. The waist is slightly tilted to the back right to create a flexible curve. The left eye is winking with a bright smile, and the right eye is 70% closed for a charming smiling expression. Both hands are raised to the side of the head, lightly touching the ends of the hair in a dynamic and joyful pose. Wearing the Ridiculous Pink Floral Shirring Frill Swim Set. The short cut hairstyle shines under the sunlight with a naturally messy feel. Bright makeup emphasizing the wink and smile. Dazzling sunlight shines from behind, creating strong shadows on the subject and hair. Strong light reflects off the emerald sea. Transparent emerald water contrasts with the soft pink swimsuit folds. Overall bright, healthy, and refreshing mood. Captured as a full body shot on a smartphone. Deep depth of field showing the lake and horizon. Standing on a white sandy beach with clear emerald water ahead. Clear blue sky. A small Meta Threads logo at bottom right with "CHAse" written in white script. 3:4 ratio.
